mano_cua.result_summary: 绘制圆形后进入编辑模式，拖拽圆形中心标记成功移动圆形位置。圆形形状、大小和半径在移动过程中保持完整，半径虚线正确连接新中心位置到半径句柄。编辑功能完全可用，无功能性 bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The circle drawing, edit mode activation, and center marker dragging all worked correctly. The circle successfully followed the center marker drag and updated its position on the map. No functional bugs were observed in this workflow.
